title: Travel Passages
description: Structures, villager trade overrides, and a way to fast travel
body:
### Travel Passages

- Wall-less underground structures to get around easier without missing out on ores.
- Surface camp stash sites to provide extra exploration supply.
- A datapack based villager trade override table that rerolls on restocking.
- A way to fast travel by sleeping with a map in hand/offhand.

All features can be turned off/overriden with datapack.
